habitat: Mountain meadows of Central Europe; protected in many areas; cultivated substitutes used.
traditionalUsesEn: Traditional external use for bruises and muscle ache (ointments, gels).
traditionalUsesDe: Traditionell äußerlich bei Prellungen und Muskelkater (Salben, Gele).
activeCompounds: Sesquiterpene lactones (helenalin derivatives), flavonoids, essential oil
preparation: Diluted topical products only. Not for broken skin or internal self-medication.
cautions: Toxic if swallowed. External use only as directed. Asteraceae allergy.
historicalNotes: Alpine folk medicine; conservation concerns for wild collection.
